description: ANALYST proposes TASK-SMOKE-E2E-0001: end-to-end smoke validation of the full autonomous governance loop following P3.2A completion. Task covers five verifiable check items: (1) dispatch role filter presence and correctness in auditor-runner.yml at commit 3300a85e; (2) server-side current_task.json update step presence and PRE_ACTION_APPROVED gate in auditor-runner.yml at commit cd1ab93d; (3) analyst-verifier-runner.yml existence and input/dispatch contract at commit 43b41dc8; (4) ledger ACTION_COMPLETED entries for TASK-P3-0011 and TASK-P3-0012 with correct schema and commit SHAs; (5) no unresolved VERIFICATION_REQUIRED events for TASK-P3-0011 or TASK-P3-0012. Proof target is governance/smoke/smoke-e2e-0001-report.json. Routing to AUDITOR for pre-action approval before CLOUD_CODE executes inspection and report commit.
